user_story: As an Employee, I want to select a time off type when creating a request, so that my leave is booked against the correct policy
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Apply Time Off screen; When I choose a time off type from the dropdown; Then the request is associated with that leave type

user_story: As an Employee, I want to specify a From and To date and time, so that my time off covers the correct period
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Apply Time Off screen; When I open the calendar and time view to set From and To values; Then the requested duration is calculated for those dates

user_story: As an Employee, I want to mark a request as tentative and add a reason, so that my manager understands the nature and intent of the leave
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Apply Time Off screen; When I tick Tentative request and enter a reason for time off; Then the request records its tentative flag and justification

user_story: As an Employee, I want to notify peers by selecting employees and adding email ids, so that colleagues are informed of my absence
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Apply Time Off screen; When I enable Notify peers and select employees or specify comma separated email ids with a message; Then those recipients are added to the notification list

user_story: As an Employee, I want to upload supporting documents for my time off, so that proof such as medical certificates is attached to the request
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Apply Time Off screen; When I browse and upload a document; Then the file is attached to the time off request

user_story: As an Employee, I want to add entries to a list and then save or submit my request, so that my time off is recorded and sent for approval
acceptance_criteria: Given I have completed the time off form; When I click Add to list and then Save or Submit; Then the request is persisted and routed for approval

user_story: As an Employee, I want to be warned when my applied time off exceeds my balance, so that I can consciously proceed on loss of pay
acceptance_criteria: Given my applied time off is more than my balance; When I submit the request; Then I am asked to confirm proceeding on loss of pay for the remaining time off
